collection.providerInterface: GitHub REST API through explicit GitHub CLI GET requests
collection.mutationGuard: GET-only; auto-remediation and provider writes are rejected before collection

results.observedValue: main requires pull requests, zero approving reviews for the sole-maintainer exception, seven strict checks, resolved conversations, administrator enforcement, and denies force-push and deletion.
results.diagnostic: The protected branch remains usable without a self-approval bypass.

results.observedValue: The active prospective release-tag ruleset denies unauthorized creation, update, and deletion while leaving historical tags untouched.
results.diagnostic: The sole maintainer is the explicitly recorded ruleset bypass actor.

results.observedValue: GitHub reports immutable releases enabled true.
results.diagnostic: The control is prospective and does not rewrite historical releases or tags.

results.observedValue: Each named release environment has the sole named reviewer, prevents self-review, denies administrator bypass, and restricts deployment to protected branches.
results.diagnostic: Environment protection remains target-isolated and does not authorize publication.

results.observedValue: Default workflow token permissions are read and workflows cannot approve pull-request reviews.
results.diagnostic: Repository defaults do not grant implicit write authority.

results.observedValue: GitHub Actions permits all actions and does not require SHA pinning at the repository setting.
results.diagnostic: The repository source scanner separately enforces immutable Action pins, but this provider setting remains a blocking noncompliance.

results.observedValue: No approved safe non-production or reversible revocation authority is recorded.
results.diagnostic: A provider-backed revocation exercise remains blocked.
